source.scope: Official-legislation-backed South Korea calendar-year 2026 national and standard local tax on caller-confirmed resident global-income tax base.

KR.notes: Resident global-income tax base under the eight national statutory bands plus the corresponding standard personal local income-tax bands. Local ordinance variations and credits remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 national and standard local income tax on caller-confirmed resident global-income tax base.
